name: Below the Sea Level: Legacy of the Deep
description:
You find yourself in Oceanis Prime, the first underwater city in human history and a testing ground for Mars colonization. Lights shimmer along the transparent domes and glass corridors, and the city pulses with energy, a monument to human ingenuity and ambition.

Tonight, you attend the city’s grand gala, where the world’s wealthiest and most influential gather. In the central auditorium, beneath a ceiling that glows like liquid sapphire, Martin Clarke introduces the evening’s focal point, Patrick Castle. You hear that he became the world’s first trillionaire at just 31 years old and now holds thirty-three trillion dollars, yet he invested it all to bring Oceanis Prime to life, leaving a legacy far beyond wealth or power.

Amid the glittering crowd, your attention is drawn to Meredith Castle, Patrick’s granddaughter. She approaches you with calm authority, measuring every step and word. She speaks of networking, understanding, and influence, not for fleeting attention, but to truly know who you are. You feel her gaze assess your ambition, your intentions, even your character, as the murmurs of the gala fade into the background.

In that suspended moment, beneath the domes of Oceanis Prime, you realize you are at the beginning of something monumental. This is more than a city, a gala, or a legacy, it is a world of possibilities, decisions, and power that now includes you.

The story has only just begun.

You can find the complete Below Sea Level series via the link below 🔗📚

  • Below Sea Level Universe
creator: ScreamingWolf
